summary: Comprehensive testing of Zitex Pricing and Referral System completed. All backend APIs (17/17 tests passed - 100%) and frontend functionality verified working correctly. Fixed minor bug in frontend (wrong API endpoint for voices).

integration_issues.issue: Frontend was calling /api/tts/voices but backend endpoint is /api/voices - FIXED

passed_tests: API GET /api/pricing - Returns 200 with correct structure
API GET /api/pricing - Contains credits_packages array with 3 packages
API GET /api/pricing - Contains subscriptions object with images_monthly, videos_monthly, all_inclusive
API GET /api/pricing - Contains service_costs with image_generation, video costs, website costs
API GET /api/pricing - Contains referral_rewards with inviter_bonus=30, invited_bonus=20
API GET /api/user/balance - Requires authentication (401)
API GET /api/user/balance - Returns credits, bonus_points, free_images, free_videos, service_costs
API GET /api/referral/info - Requires authentication (401)
API GET /api/referral/info - Returns referral_code (8 chars uppercase), referral_link, total_referrals, rewards
API POST /api/auth/register - Without referral gives 20 signup bonus points
API POST /api/auth/register - With valid referral gives 40 points (20 signup + 20 referral)
API POST /api/auth/register - With invalid referral still works (20 points)
API GET /api/pricing/calculate - Calculates image_generation cost correctly
API GET /api/pricing/calculate - Calculates video_60_seconds cost correctly
API GET /api/pricing/calculate - Returns 400 for invalid service
API POST /api/referral/apply - Requires authentication (401)
API POST /api/referral/apply - Returns 400 for invalid referral code
Frontend - Pricing page loads with all sections (credits packages, subscriptions, service costs)
Frontend - Pricing page shows 3 credit packages with buy buttons
Frontend - Pricing page shows 3 subscription options with subscribe buttons
Frontend - Register page loads with referral code pre-filled from URL
Frontend - Register page shows signup bonus message (20 points + 3 images + 2 videos)
Frontend - Register page shows referral bonus indicator (+20 extra points)
Frontend - Mobile chat page loads with collapsible sidebar
Frontend - Mobile hamburger menu button visible and functional
Frontend - Mobile sidebar opens/closes correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pricing, referral, and mobile chat features working)

seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed users created during registration tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pricing and referral system fully functional. /api/pricing returns comprehensive pricing config including credits_packages, subscriptions, service_costs, referral_rewards. Registration with referral code gives 40 points (20 signup + 20 referral). Mobile chat UI has collapsible sidebar with hamburger menu. Fixed frontend bug: changed /api/tts/voices to /api/voices.

pricing_system.credits_packages: Working - 3 packages (starter, pro, enterprise) with SAR/USD prices

referral_system.referral_info: Working - returns referral_code, link, total_referrals, rewards
referral_system.referral_apply: Working - validates code, adds bonus points
referral_system.referral_bonus: Working - 20 points for invited, 30 for inviter

mobile_chat_ui.chat_input: Working - visible and functional on mobile

bug_fixed.description: Frontend was calling /api/tts/voices but backend endpoint is /api/voices
